scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:web
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w @file-service/shared && npm run build -w @file-service/api && npm run build -w @file-service/worker
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:backend && npm run build:web
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,worker,web -c blue,green,magenta "tsx watch backend/api/src/index.ts" "tsx watch backend/worker/src/index.ts" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api-web: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "tsx watch backend/api/src/index.ts" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api-only: docker compose -f shared/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis && npm run dev:api
scripts.dev:api-audio: docker compose -f shared/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis && concurrently -k -n api,worker -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:worker"
